name: Cherry Mash
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the chocolate chips and peanut butter in an 8-cup glass measuring cup.
2. Microwave on HIGH for 1-1/2 minutes, stirring until melted; stir in nuts.
3. Spread half of the mixture into a 13x9-inch pan.
4. In a mixing bowl, combine the cherry pie filling and marshmallow cream.
5. Spread this mixture over the chocolate layer.
6. Top with the remaining chocolate mixture.
7. Chill for several hours until firm.
8. Cut into 1-1/2-inch squares. (NOTE: These can also be made in mini baking cups.)
